findings.title: Configuration is valid
findings.observed: fixture config parses, but operational warnings remain
findings.recommendation: Use warnings as follow-up work before treating the fleet as production-ready.

findings.title: Execution reference is op-geth
findings.recommendation: op-geth and op-program support ends May 31, 2026. Keep op-geth as a temporary reference only while validating an op-reth candidate.

findings.title: Execution candidate is op-reth/reth
findings.recommendation: Continue validating candidate behavior against the reference until cutover.

findings.title: Execution candidate head is close to reference
findings.recommendation: Keep monitoring lag while block and RPC comparisons continue.

findings.title: Execution blocks match
findings.observed: compared 16 common blocks with matching hashes and roots
findings.recommendation: Continue comparing common blocks during migration rehearsal.

findings.title: Only one source op-node is configured
findings.recommendation: Add source-node redundancy before many light or sequencer nodes depend on the source tier.

findings.title: op-node peer count is below threshold
findings.recommendation: Investigate P2P connectivity and peer discovery; source nodes should not silently lose peer coverage.

findings.title: Derivation errors observed
findings.recommendation: Investigate derivation errors and correlate with L1 RPC, resets, and source-node load.

findings.title: Follower safe head lags source
findings.observed: safe head lag is 34 blocks, above threshold 20
findings.recommendation: Check follow-source reachability, source-node health, and follower safe-chain tracking.

findings.title: Deriver proxyd consensus awareness is not declared
findings.recommendation: Use consensus-aware proxyd for production deriver routing when source-node backends can disagree.

findings.title: Interop fixture scope
findings.observed: basic dependency readiness only; no cross-chain message validation is implied
findings.recommendation: Use this as a dependency observability warning example, not as proof of protocol readiness.

findings.title: Interop dependency metrics are absent
findings.observed: metrics endpoint not configured or unreachable
findings.recommendation: Add metrics for each dependency chain so dependency-set health is visible before interop workloads rely on it.
